title: Durable Job Record
description: Schema for a durable job record persisted to disk by the Local Brain job store.

jobId.description: Stable unique identifier for this job.

executionType.description: Whether this job runs a track or a workflow.

input.description: Structured input payload for the job.

status.description: Current lifecycle status of the job.

attempt.description: Current attempt number (0-based on create, incremented on retry).

maxAttempts.description: Maximum number of attempts before the job is considered exhausted.

lease.description: Active lease held by a worker, or null when not leased.

holder.description: Identifier of the worker holding this lease.

startedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when the lease was granted.

expiresAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when the lease expires.

createdAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when the job was created.

updatedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of the last state change.

startedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when the job began executing (running).

completedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when the job reached a terminal state.

correlationId.description: Correlation identifier linking this job to its originating request.

result.description: Output payload when the job completes successfully. Null until completion.

error.description: Error details when the job fails. Null when no error.

retryable.description: Whether this error is eligible for automatic retry.

evidenceRefs.description: References to evidence artifacts produced by this job.

review.description: Human review metadata when the job enters or exits paused_review.

reviewAction.description: The review action taken (request_review, approve, reject, request_correction, stop).

reviewedBy.description: Identifier of the human or system that performed the review.

reviewedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when the review was performed.

reviewReason.description: Optional reason or note accompanying the review action.
